TreeViewNode.ShowCheckboxes: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own ShowCheckboxes (already documented there), forwarded down by TreeView.razor to the internal recursive row renderer. TreeViewNode is never placed as a <TreeViewNode> tag by consumers (see the note on its own table); only the handful of node-local props (Item, Level, PosInSet, SetSize, SelectedNodes, OnSelectionChanged) are documented on this page for reference.
TreeViewNode.Expandable: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own Expandable (already documented there), see ShowCheckboxes above.
TreeViewNode.OnItemClick: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own OnItemClick (already documented there), see ShowCheckboxes above.
TreeViewNode.OnItemCheck: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own OnItemCheck (already documented there), see ShowCheckboxes above.
TreeViewNode.CascadeCheck: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own CascadeCheck (already documented there), see ShowCheckboxes above.
TreeViewNode.MultiSelect: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own MultiSelect (already documented there), see ShowCheckboxes above.
TreeViewNode.ExpandOnRowClick: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own ExpandOnRowClick (already documented there), see ShowCheckboxes above.
TreeViewNode.NodeTemplate: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own NodeTemplate (already documented there), see ShowCheckboxes above.
TreeViewNode.LoadChildren: TreeViewNode parameter — pure pass-through of TreeView<T>'s own LoadChildren (already documented there), see ShowCheckboxes above.

DataGridHeader.ActiveFilterColumn: DataGridHeader parameter — internal renderer sub-component wired only by DataGrid.razor itself (tracks which column's filter popover is open). Never placed as a <DataGridHeader> tag by consumers; not part of the public composition API.
DataGridHeader.OnFilterToggle: DataGridHeader/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring for the filter popover, propagated from DataGrid.razor. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridHeader.OnFilterApply: DataGridHeader/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring that commits a column filter back up to DataGrid.razor. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridHeader.HasDetailTemplate: DataGridBody/DataGridFooter/DataGridHeader parameter — internal renderer wiring propagated from DataGrid.razor's DetailTemplate (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.

DataGridHeaderCell.OnFilterToggle: DataGridHeader/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring for the filter popover, propagated from DataGrid.razor. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridHeaderCell.OnFilterApply: DataGridHeader/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring that commits a column filter back up to DataGrid.razor. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridHeaderCell.AriaColIndex: DataGridCell/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer sub-components for a single grid cell, instantiated only by DataGrid.razor's row/header rendering. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridHeaderCell.ColumnIndex: DataGridCell/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see AriaColIndex above.
DataGridHeaderCell.Column: DataGridCell/DataGridColumnFilter parameter — internal renderer wiring: the resolved DataGridColumn passed down from DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridHeaderCell.HasActiveFilter: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer sub-component for a single header cell, instantiated only by DataGridHeader. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridHeaderCell.IsFilterOpen: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see HasActiveFilter above.
DataGridHeaderCell.SortDirection: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see HasActiveFilter above.
DataGridHeaderCell.SortPriority: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see HasActiveFilter above.
DataGridHeaderCell.TotalSortCount: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see HasActiveFilter above.

DataGridGroupRow.Aggregates: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer sub-component for a single group header row, instantiated only by DataGrid.razor's grouping logic. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridGroupRow.GroupKey: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring, see Aggregates above.
DataGridGroupRow.Count: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring, see Aggregates above.
DataGridGroupRow.OnToggle: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring, see Aggregates above.
DataGridGroupRow.Level: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring, see Aggregates above.
DataGridGroupRow.ColSpan: DataGridDetailRow/DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring computed from the visible column count. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridGroupRow.RowIndex: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: this group header row's position among every rendered row in the tbody (group and item rows alike), computed and passed down by DataGridBody.razor for aria-rowindex. Not a consumer-facing tag.

DataGridFooter.AllItems: DataGridFooter/DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring passed down from DataGrid.razor for aggregate/export computation. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridFooter.HasDetailTemplate: DataGridBody/DataGridFooter/DataGridHeader parameter — internal renderer wiring propagated from DataGrid.razor's DetailTemplate (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.

DataGridToolbar.AllItems: DataGridFooter/DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring passed down from DataGrid.razor for aggregate/export computation. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridToolbar.EffectiveColumns: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer sub-component wired only by DataGrid.razor (the visible-columns list for export/column-chooser). Not a consumer-facing tag; consumers customize the toolbar via <ToolbarContent>, which is documented.
DataGridToolbar.OnColumnVisibilityToggle: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.OnColumnToggle: DataGridToolbar/DataGridColumnVisibility parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.OnExport: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.OnRemoveFilter: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.OnSaveLayout: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.OnResetLayout: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.OnApplyNamedLayout: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.OnToggleExpanded: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.SearchText: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.SearchTextChanged: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridToolbar.RegisteredContent: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring that carries the consumer's registered <ToolbarContent> (already documented) through to the toolbar renderer. Not a consumer-facing tag itself.

DataGridCell.AriaColIndex: DataGridCell/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer sub-components for a single grid cell, instantiated only by DataGrid.razor's row/header rendering. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridCell.ColumnIndex: DataGridCell/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see AriaColIndex above.
DataGridCell.Navigable: DataGridCell parameter — internal renderer wiring (roving-tabindex keyboard navigation), see AriaColIndex above.
DataGridCell.Item: DataGridCell/DataGridRow/DataGridDetailRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: the row data object passed down from DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridCell.Column: DataGridCell/DataGridColumnFilter parameter — internal renderer wiring: the resolved DataGridColumn passed down from DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridCell.RowIndex: DataGridRow/DataGridCell parameter — internal renderer wiring: the row's position, computed and passed down by DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.

DataGridDetailRow.Item: DataGridCell/DataGridRow/DataGridDetailRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: the row data object passed down from DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridDetailRow.ColSpan: DataGridDetailRow/DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring computed from the visible column count. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridDetailRow.AriaRowIndex: DataGridDetailRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: this expanded detail row's position among every rendered row in the tbody (header, group, item, and detail rows alike), computed and passed down by DataGridBody.razor via DataGridRow.DetailAriaRowIndex for aria-rowindex only. Not a consumer-facing tag.

DataGridRow.Item: DataGridCell/DataGridRow/DataGridDetailRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: the row data object passed down from DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridRow.OnContextMenu: DataGridBody/DataGridRow parameter — internal renderer wiring propagated from DataGrid.razor's RowContextMenu (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridRow.RowIndex: DataGridRow/DataGridCell parameter — internal renderer wiring: the row's position, computed and passed down by DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridRow.RowToken: DataGridRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: a stable per-slot identity token used for virtualization/reorder tracking. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridRow.TableRowIndex: DataGridRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: this row's position among every rendered row in the tbody, including group header rows that RowIndex deliberately does not count. Computed and passed down by DataGridBody.razor for aria-rowindex only. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridRow.DetailAriaRowIndex: DataGridRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: the aria-rowindex reserved for this row's own expanded DataGridDetailRow, when one will render. Computed and passed down by DataGridBody.razor (via DataGridRowIndexer) so the detail row's table position is accounted for. Not a consumer-facing tag.

DataGridColumnFilter.Column: DataGridCell/DataGridColumnFilter parameter — internal renderer wiring: the resolved DataGridColumn passed down from DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
DataGridColumnFilter.CurrentFilter: DataGridColumnFilter parameter — internal renderer sub-component for the filter popover body, instantiated only by DataGridHeader/DataGridHeaderCell. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridColumnFilter.OnApply: DataGridColumnFilter parameter — internal renderer wiring, see CurrentFilter above.

DataGridColumnVisibility.OnColumnToggle: DataGridToolbar/DataGridColumnVisibility parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
DataGridColumnVisibility.OnColumnPin: DataGridColumnVisibility parameter — internal renderer sub-component for the Columns panel, instantiated only by DataGridToolbar. Not a consumer-facing tag.

DataGridBody.HasDetailTemplate: DataGridBody/DataGridFooter/DataGridHeader parameter — internal renderer wiring propagated from DataGrid.razor's DetailTemplate (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridBody.OnContextMenu: DataGridBody/DataGridRow parameter — internal renderer wiring propagated from DataGrid.razor's RowContextMenu (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridBody.ServerVirtualizationProvider: DataGridBody parameter — internal renderer wiring derived from DataGrid.razor's Virtualized/OnRangeRequest (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridBody.SkeletonRowCount: DataGridBody parameter — internal renderer wiring (loading-skeleton row count), not independently exposed on DataGrid. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridBody.UseVirtualization: DataGridBody parameter — internal renderer wiring derived from DataGrid.razor's Virtualized/VirtualizeThreshold (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.

DataGridPagination.PageChanged: DataGridPagination parameter — internal renderer sub-component instantiated only by DataGrid.razor; consumers configure paging via the documented PageSize/ShowPagination/PageSizeOptions on DataGrid itself. Not a consumer-facing tag.
DataGridPagination.PageSizeChanged: DataGridPagination parameter — internal renderer wiring, see PageChanged above.
